utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: I would better get back to my desk .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I will remember to put that in your evaluation .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I will remember to put that in your evaluation .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , you have been here for two months now and your boss is required to hand in a performance evaluation .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: But you know , there is one thing that I have yet to evaluate .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , I have just always wanted to do that .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I have just always wanted to do that .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Can you help me clean this up ?
